definition.name: face_of_cone
definition.definition: Let V^+ be a cone in V and x ∈ V^+. The face of V^+ generated by x is face_{V^+}(x) = {w ∈ V^+ : ∃ λ > 0, x - λw ∈ V^+}. Equivalently, face_{V^+}(x) consists of all elements of V^+ that can be "majorised" by a positive multiple of x. This is the smallest face of V^+ containing x in its relative interior.
